export const userLayoutStyles = {
  wrapper: {
    display: 'flex',
    flexDirection: 'column',
    minHeight: '100vh',
    fontFamily: 'sans-serif'
  },
  header: {
    display: 'flex',

    justifyContent: 'space-between',

    background: '#fff',

    gap: 8

  avatar: {

    fontWeight: 700,
    fontSize: 15,
    cursor: 'pointer',
    border: '2px solid #e5e7eb',

    border: 'none',
